ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cashew nut, dry-grilled, no added salt

ingredients_text: Dried Cranberries Split (20%) (Cranberries, Sugar, Sunflower Oil), Cashewnut Split (14%), Seedless Black Raisins (13%), Almond Split (10%), Black Currant (10%), Sunflower Seeds (10%), Pumpkin Seeds (10%), Dried Fig (7%), Dried Apricot (3%) & Green Pistachio Nuts (3%)
